name: daily monitor proceeds to start when the quality-eval gate result file declares pass
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"gate":"pass","precision":0.85,"mean_usefulness":4.0}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources-stub fixtures/sources.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'monitor_started' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
